title: hebe hillii
intro: Hebe hillii, commonly known as the dwarf or compact Hebe, is a flowering plant species belonging to the hebe genus in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hebe hillii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Hebe hillii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
